channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda a global public health emergency
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- What to Know About the Latest Ebola Outbreak
- Ebola outbreak in Africa declared health emergency
- Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda declared global health emergency
- Americans in DR Congo may have had exposure to Ebola in outbreak, US media reports
- WHO Declares Global Emergency Over Ebola Strain With No Vaccine. Here's What To Know
- DRC struggling to contain Ebola outbreak as cases spread
- Will the latest Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda spread further?
- WHO Declares Global Emergency Over Ebola Strain With No Vaccine. Here's What To Know
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda an emergency of international concern
- What is Ebola and why is WHO treating outbreak as global health emergency?
- WHO declares global health emergency on Ebola
- DRC faces deadly Ebola resurgence amid worsening humanitarian crisis
- Ebola outbreak in Central Africa declared a ‘Public Health Emergency of International Concern’
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda an emergency of international concern
- Factbox-What do we know about the Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda?
- What we know about the latest Ebola outbreak after WHO declares global health emergency
- WHO Declares Ebola Virus Outbreak in Congo, Uganda Public Health Emergency
- WHO Declares Global Health Emergency After Ebola Outbreak in Congo
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DRC a global health emergency
- How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
- What do we know about the Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda?
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda an emergency of international concern
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, Uganda an 'emergency of international concern'
- Global health emergency declared after Ebola spreads from DR Congo
- WHO declares international emergency as Ebola outbreak kills more than 80 in DR Congo
- WHO Declares Ebola Virus Outbreak in Congo, Uganda Public Health Emergency
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DRC, Uganda a global emergency: What to know
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DRC, Uganda a global emergency: What to know
- WHO declares global health emergency over Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Central Africa a public health emergency after 80 suspected deaths
- Ebola outbreak public health emergency of int'l concern: WHO
- What to know about the Ebola outbreak that the WHO has declared a global health emergency
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak an international public health emergency
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, Uganda a global health emergency
- Ebola outbreak worsens in Central Africa, but not pandemic: WHO
- WHO declares global health emergency over Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda a global health emergency
- WHO declares global health emergency over Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda
- Africa's Ebola outbreak public health emergency of int'l concern: WHO
- More than 80 people killed in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo
- WHO declares global health emergency over Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda
- Ebola outbreak is a global health emergency, WHO says
- WHO declares int’l emergency as Ebola outbreak kills more than 80 in DR Congo
- WHO declares global health emergency over Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda ‘emergency’ of international concern
- W.H.O. Declares Ebola Outbreak a Global Health Emergency
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda an emergency of international concern
- WHO Declares International Emergency As Ebola Outbreak Kills More Than 80 In DR Congo
- WHO declares international emergency as Ebola outbreak kills more than 80 in DR Congo
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, Uganda a global health emergency
- Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, Uganda declared an international health emergency
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo a global health emergency
- WHO declares public health emergency of international concern over Ebola in Africa
- DR Congo Confirms New Ebola Outbreak — WHO
- WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda an emergency of international concern
- WHO declares international emergency over Ebola outbreak
- Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda triggers global emergency status: WHO
- WHO declares global health emergency over Ebola outbreak; 80 dead, symptoms, no vaccine for current strain: What we know
- Ebola: Portrait of a killer virus
- WHO declares global health emergency over rare Ebola outbreak]]>

item.title: Fire breaks out after drone strike on UAE nuclear power plant: Authorities
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Drone strike hits UAE nuclear plant as US-Iran ceasefire teeters
- Drone strike starts fire outside UAE nuclear plant
- UAE reports drone strike at nuclear power plant as Iran war deadlock persists
- UAE blames Iran or its proxies for drone strike fire near nuclear plant
- UAE says drone strike caused fire at nuclear plant
- UAE condemns drone strike near nuclear plant as ‘dangerous escalation’
- UAE reports strike near Abu Dhabi nuclear power plant
- Strait of Hormuz deadlock deepens? Drone strike at nuclear power plant in UAE
- Drone Strike Sparks Fire at UAE Nuclear Power Plant Amid Iran Ceasefire, Officials Say
- UAE reports drone strike at nuclear power plant as Iran war deadlock endures
- Drone strike sparks fire on perimeter of UAE’s Barakah nuclear power plant
- Drone strike sparks fire on perimeter of UAE’s Barakah nuclear power plant
- UAE says drone strike caused fire at nuclear plant
- Drone Strike Sparks Fire Near U.A.E. Nuclear Plant
- Drone strike sparks fire on the edge of the UAE's nuclear power plant in latest blow to Iran truce
- Drone strike sparks fire near UAE nuclear plant amid Iran ceasefire tension
- Why Abu Dhabi's Barakah nuclear power plant, latest target of drone strike, is crucial to UAE
- UAE reports drone strike at nuclear power plant as Iran war deadlock endures
- Drone targets UAE nuclear power plant, straining Iran war ceasefire
- Drone strike starts fire outside UAE nuclear plant
- Drone strike starts fire outside UAE nuclear plant
- Drone strike sparks a fire on the perimeter of UAE’s nuclear power plant, shaking Iran war ceasefire
- Drone strike causes fire at Abu Dhabi nuclear power plant
- Drone attack sparks fire near Abu Dhabi nuclear plant
- Drone strike causes fire outside nuclear power plant in Abu Dhabi
- Urgent: UAE Abu Dhabi media office says drone strike causes fire near nuclear power plant, no safety risk reported
- Flash: UAE Abu Dhabi media office says drone strike causes fire near nuclear power plant, no impact on radiological levels reported
- A drone strike causes fire outside a nuclear power plant in Abu Dhabi
- Drone strike causes fire at UAE's Barakah Nuclear Power Plant in Abu Dhabi]]>

item.title: Ukraine drones kill four in Russia
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Russia destroyed over 3,000 Ukrainian drones last week, RIA says
- Russia downs 1,045 Ukrainian drones in 24 hours
- 36 Ukrainian drones taken down over Russian regions, Azov Sea in seven hours
- Four people killed in mass Ukrainian drone attacks in Russia
- At least 4 killed by Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia
- Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia kills at least 4 and wound 12 others
- Three killed in major Ukrainian drone raid on Greater Moscow: What we know so far (PHOTO, VIDEO)
- Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia kill 4, wound 12 others, while debris lands on Moscow airport
- Mass Ukraine drone barrage kills 4 in Russia: Moscow
- Mass Ukraine Drone Barrage Kills 4 In Russia: Moscow
- Four dead as Moscow faces largest Ukrainian drone assault in over a year
- At least 4 people killed in one of the largest Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia
- At least four killed in Ukrainian drone attacks on Russia
- Three killed in major Ukrainian drone raid on Greater Moscow: What we know so far (PHOTO, VIDEO)
- At least 4 people killed in one of the largest Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia
- Mass Ukraine drone barrage kills 4 in Russia: Moscow
- Mass Ukraine Drone Barrage Kills 3 in Moscow Region
- Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
- At least 4 killed in major Ukrainian drone attack on Russia
- At least 3 killed in Ukrainian drone strike on Moscow
- Over 500 drones downed: 4 killed in Russia as Ukraine launches biggest attack in over a year]]>
